title: Is it possible to set an automation on a part of the items column

posts.author: HenryKorteweg (Henry Korteweg)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use the outlook integration.

We want to create an automation based on the item name. The item name is the subject of the received email.

If the subject of the email contains for example “your account is activated” then move the item to a group “Solved”

posts.author: Leandre_R (Léandre @LaBriqueJaune)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @HenryKorteweg

You can sort your Outlook emails based on the subject/sender/body of the received email.

Consider this integration:

Capture d’écran 2024-01-17 à 14.39.50766×544 58 KB

Does this solution meet your needs?
